nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Northern fiscal
nodes.summary: Northern fiscal（Northern fiscal，学名 Lanius humeralis），常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The northern fiscal lives in a wide range of habitats from grassland with fences for perching to acacia thornveld or even woodland, but avoids very dense habitats where its hunting would be impaired
